faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.1.a: Yes, the simulator is 100% free with no commitment. You answer 6 questions and get your results instantly.
faq.2.a: We analyze 6 Luxembourg programs: SME Package Digital, SME Package AI, SME Package Cybersecurity, Fit 4 Digital, Fit 4 AI and Fit 4 Innovation.
faq.3.q: Who can benefit from these grants?
faq.3.a: Any SME established in Luxembourg with a business permit. Most sectors are eligible including HORECA, retail, crafts, services and manufacturing.
faq.4.a: Depending on your profile, you can receive up to €25,000 in grants with up to 70% of your project costs covered.
faq.5.q: How long does the process take?
faq.5.a: The simulation takes 10 seconds. If you're eligible, the grant application process typically takes 4-8 weeks depending on the program.

about.title: About OpenLetz
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.text: OpenLetz is a service by COMMIT MEDIA SARL (RCS B276192), a Luxembourg company specialized in digital support for SMEs. Our free simulator identifies in 10 seconds the grant programs you are eligible for, covering digital transformation and AI adoption.
about.why.title: Why OpenLetz?
about.why.text: Luxembourg offers some of Europe's most generous funding programs for SME digitalization, but many companies are unaware of these grants or find the process complex. OpenLetz simplifies this process.
about.programs.title: 6 referenced programs
about.programs.text: We analyze your eligibility for the 6 main Luxembourg programs: SME Package Digital, SME Package AI, SME Package Cybersecurity, Fit 4 Digital, Fit 4 AI and Fit 4 Innovation. Up to €25,000 per program and up to 70% coverage.
pricing.title: Our services & pricing
pricing.subtitle: Thanks to AI, we deliver faster and cheaper. The simulator is free, our services start from €190/month.
pricing.advantage.title: AI allows us to lower our prices
pricing.advantage.text: We use artificial intelligence in all our services: AI-assisted development, automated testing, predictive maintenance. Result: projects delivered 2-3× faster, and savings we share with our clients.
